agentReconnecting: Agent reconnecting. Try again in a few seconds.
noRulesEnabled: All traffic is blocked by default (deny policy).
watchdogCountdown: If not confirmed within <0>{{count}}s</0>, the change will be reverted automatically.
watchdogFooter: ⚡ <0>Watchdog-revert</0>: every change is applied but will be reverted automatically after 60s if you don't confirm. Protection against rules that lock you out of the server.
